markdown:
# Challenge Rating

Challenge Rating (CR) summarizes the threat a [[monster]] poses to a group of four [[player_character]]. Compare a [[monster]] CR to the characters' level. If the CR is higher, the [[monster]] is likely a danger. If the CR is lower, the [[monster]] likely poses little threat. But circumstances and the number of [[player_character]] can significantly alter how threatening a [[monster]] is in actual play. The Dungeon Master's Guide provides guidance to the DM on using CR while planning potential combat [[encounter]].
